signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Resolved at 220-239 | YES (for 220-239 outcome) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Resolved at 220-239 | YES (for 220-239 outcome) | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active market, "Elon Musk # tweets April 14 - April 21, 2026?", has just resolved with the crowd assigning 100% to the 220-239 range, reflecting over $28M in trading volume as of April 20, 2026[3][4]. This resolution, occurring today (April 21 market end), confirms the exact count a

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP as Payment Method | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP as Payment Method | YES | HIGH confidence**

Rakuten Wallet went live on April 15, 2026, listing XRP as both an asset and payment method, reaching 44 million Rakuten Pay users and 5 million merchant locations.[1] Rakuten's 3 trillion loyalty points ($23 billion in circulation) can now convert to XRP, creating a direct payment rail for the token.[1]

signals.headline: XRP Breaks Above $1
signals.raw:
XRP Breaks Above $1.50 Resistance for First Time in 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP touched $1.51094 intraday on April 17, the first time it reached $1.50 since a February flash sell-off.[1] The move came two days after the Rakuten announcement, though the token subsequently pulled back to $1.4278 by April 19.[1]

Six Spot ETFs with ~$1 Billion AUM Now Active | YES | HIGH confidence**
